query: How do I reset my password?
note: canonical accounts how-to; the baseline sanity case

query: I lost my phone with the authenticator app on it — how do I get back into my account?

query: What is the software reimbursement policy?
note: policy lookup: faithfulness catches invented thresholds/amounts not in the article

query: How do I report a phishing email I received?

Are we allowed to use AI tools like ChatGPT for work tasks?
